mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CD_SEQNO ASC) AS LINE_NO , CMMN_CD_ID , CD , ORG_ID , UP_CD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD P WHERE P.CD = CMCD.UP_CD AND P.ORG_ID = CMCD.ORG_ID) AS UP_CDNM , CD_SEQNO , CDNM , CD_VL , CD_ENNM , CD_EXPLN , GRPCD , USEYN , RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = CMCD.RGTR_ID) AS RGTR_NM , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = CMCD.MDFR_ID) AS MOD_NM , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMCD WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : cmmnCdDAO.list 설 명 : 리스트 */
/* SQL ID : CmmnCdDAO.listPageing 설 명 : 코드의 페이징 목록 */
